title: rosa agrestis var. mentita
intro: Rosa agrestis var. mentita, also known as Wild Rose or Field Rose, is a fragrant and flowering shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa agrestis var. mentita include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
